name: Farah Damji
profileSummary: Farah Damji, also known as Farah Dan, is a Ugandan-born British convicted criminal with multiple convictions pertaining to fraud and stalking in the United States, South Africa, and United Kingdom. In 2016, Damji was described by The Sunday Times as "a notorious conwoman," and by other newspapers as "London's most dangerous woman" in 2021. On 11 July 2025, Damji was convicted and sentenced to six years on the charges of stalking, theft and fraud against a former British diplomat.
